positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a friendly, bioluminescent woodland creature nestled among enormous, glowing mushrooms and stylized ferns. The creature has soft, appealing shapes and vibrant colors (teals, deep blues, emerald greens, and soft lavender) that contrast against a dark, slightly textured, midnight forest background. Focus on clean silhouettes and smooth gradients. The composition should be centered, suitable for a chest print on apparel, with high contrast and a subtle art nouveau influence. Deep shadows and dappled light should create depth, giving it an ethereal, dreamy feel. Perfect for a screen-printed t-shirt.
